reviews.comment:
Mala atención, no in forman la falta de algunos combistibles (ej.Nafta Super) los clientes hacemos largas filas y llegado el momento de la carga te informan que no tienen ese combustible, y que los dueños no les permiten a los empleados que informen a los clientes de está situación. Dejando cautivos y casi obligando a los clientes a cargar Combustible Premium

(Translated by Google)
Poor service. Customers are left in long lines when it's time to fill up. When it's time to fill up, they tell you they don't have that fuel, and the owners don't allow employees to inform customers of this situation. This leaves customers captive and almost forcing them to fill up with Premium Fuel.
